g.text: GND Bus Bar (250A, 5/16" stud) | PSU GND -> 14 AWG -> bus bar | 18 AWG to each driver GND
Yaw | TMC2209 Addr 0 | GPIO 13/14 | base rotation
Pitch | TMC2209 Addr 1 | GPIO 16/17 | thrust bearing
Roll | TMC2209 Addr 2 | GPIO 18/19 | thrust bearing
Belt | TMC2209 Addr 3 | GPIO 25/26 | linear drive
18 AWG each (VMOT via Wago, not breadboard)
STEP/DIR (4 pairs) + UART shared bus (1k bridge) + 3.3V VIO
